summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive hydrated items and low-signal/instant close, merge, fix, and raise_pr actions are disabled. Open hydrated PRs are kept as independent inventory items unless maintainer-owned draft status requires human maintainer judgment; already closed PRs are recorded as skipped keep_closed. Five job refs were not present in the compacted hydrated artifact, so they are scoped needs_human for missing live state only.
